title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. nana
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. nana, also known as dwarf kidney vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of dwarf kidney vetch include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the affected area.
